description_long: This rifle features a classic wooden stock with a smooth, dark brown finish, extending into a robust metal receiver and barrel assembly. The barrel is long and slender, ending with a simple muzzle device, likely a flash hider. Mounted atop the receiver is a modern optical sight, possibly a red dot or reflex sight, enhancing aiming capabilities. The magazine is a detachable box type, protruding slightly below the receiver. The trigger guard and trigger are clearly defined, and the overall design suggests a blend of traditional and modern firearm elements. The rifle's construction appears sturdy, with a combination of wood and metal materials, suitable for both urban and field use.
description: A classic rifle with a wooden stock, long metal barrel, and a modern optical sight mounted on top. It features a detachable box magazine and a simple muzzle device.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile of the barrel and sight, with the wooden stock barely visible.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the wooden stock, metal receiver, optical sight, and detachable magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the end of the stock and the alignment of the sight and barrel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the wooden stock, receiver, optical sight, and magazine, mirroring the left side.
